The Mandatory Monthly Dance-Offs program is a revolutionary new initiative designed to reconcile tax discrepancies through the power of dance.  Failure to participate in the Mandatory Monthly Dance-Offs program will result in a penalty of $500 per day, plus interest, plus a 50% surcharge on all future tax liabilities.

To sign up for the Mandatory Monthly Dance-Offs program, simply reply to this email with a confirmation of your participation. You will then receive a welcome packet with instructions on how to access the dance routines and submit your performance videos.
